description.description: Cookie-consent banner body. States that the site uses cookies for analytics; followed by a 'Privacy' link to the policy. Keep it to one short sentence.

privacy.description: Link text in the consent banner pointing to the privacy/terms policy. Means 'Privacy'.

reject.description: Consent banner button: decline non-essential (analytics) cookies. Essential cookies still run.

accept.description: Consent banner button: accept analytics cookies.
